name: Kheema
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lamb, trimmed of fat and diced small
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the cloves, cinnamon, and cardamom to a powder.
2. Heat butter in a heavy pan and fry onion until brown.
3. Add ginger, garlic, turmeric, and spices. Stir and cook together for 1 minute.
4. Put in the meat and mix well. Cover and turn down the heat to low.
5. Cook for about 30 minutes without adding any water.
6. When done, add tomatoes and salt to taste. Cover and cook a little longer.
7. Serve over rice.
